name: Perfect Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 Beef chuck pot roast (3 to 4 Pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasoned salt, onion powder, pepper, and garlic powder in a small bowl.
2. Rub the mixture onto the beef pot roast.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Brown the roast in the skillet for about 5-7 minutes on each side until well browned.
5. Place the browned roast in a roasting pan.
6. Add water, chopped onion, green pepper, minced garlic, bay leaves, dried parsley flakes, and dried thyme to the roasting pan.
7. Cover the pan and bake at 325°F for 2-1/2 to 3 hours or until the roast is tender.
8. Remove the roast from the pan and keep it warm.
9. Discard the bay leaves.
10. Skim any excess fat from the pan juices.
11. Measure the juices and return them to the pan.
12. For each cup of juices, mix 1 tablespoon flour with 2 tablespoons water in a small bowl until well combined.
13. Stir the flour mixture into the pan over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly.
14. Serve the gravy over the roast.
15. Yield: 8-10 servings.
